column1: # Farsi (Persian) alphabet — 32 letters, all positional forms + name.
# Columns: index / isolated / initial / medial / final / name (romanized) /
# name_fa (Persian spelling — this is what TTS speaks).
# ا د ذ ر ز ژ و are non-joining — no initial/medial form (left blank).
# The ـ (tatweel) on connecting forms marks the join point.
